name: [oss] form-data/form-data PR #4: add getCustomHeaders and getLengthSync helpers

source.title: Changes to support custom content-type and getLengthSync.

notes: Adds getCustomHeaders/getLengthSync helpers and a .gitignore entry; new convenience APIs over existing boundary/length logic, no taint or guard change.
